positive: A minimalist, stylized cosmic creature silhouette resembling a blend of an ethereal jellyfish and a bioluminescent celestial manta ray, drifting through deep space. The creature must be rendered with clean, crisp lines and geometric grace, creating a striking, high-contrast centerpiece. The color palette should emphasize neon blues, deep violets, and electric aqua greens against a matte black, starlit void background. Use dotwork stippling and halftone patterns within the creature's body to suggest inner luminosity and texture, while keeping the edges sharp and defined for optimal printing. Highly symmetrical, central composition, designed for maximum visual impact on apparel.
